race.comment: BEDDA MIA (4) recorded her sixth minor placing from 15 starts when runner-up over 1000m here last start. Lacked the kick of the winner that day suggesting 1200m is the better option now. Won't get too many better chances to finally break through. MY PROCLAMA (6) returned from a 20-week spell and made it five placings from as many race starts when a safely held third over 1000m at this track 24 days ago. Started favourite that day so in the small field it was a bit underwhelming. Fitter and can improve over the extra furlong. CHEEKY SORT (9) raced three-wide in a small field and battled on okay for third when resuming over 1100m at Wyong recently. Gets to this trip for the first time. Nicely drawn and should give a good account. SPACE CADET (11) is open to improvement at just his second trip to the races. Hard to see the other runners troubling the top fancies.
